scripts.db:migrate:safe: node database/migrations/20260509_safe_schema_expansion.js && node database/migrations/20260510_security_schema_completion.js && node database/migrations/20260525_payout_maker_checker.js && node database/migrations/20260525_booking_date_locks_active_unique.js && node database/migrations/20260518_semantic_search_schema.js && node database/migrations/20260519_ai_image_labels_schema.js && node database/migrations/20260520_host_identity_docs_private_schema.js && node database/migrations/20260526_user_profile_public_fields.js && node database/migrations/20260528_booking_payment_expired_status_cleanup.js && node database/migrations/20260531_booking_state_machine_statuses.js && node database/migrations/20260531_booking_pricing_snapshot.js && node database/migrations/20260531_payment_provider_transaction_id_idempotency.js && node database/migrations/20260601_coupon_redemption_booking_user_unique.js && node database/migrations/20260528_host_bank_account_fields.js && node database/migrations/20260601_notification_in_app_fields.js && node database/migrations/20260601_semantic_search_observability_schema.js && node database/migrations/20260603_blogs_wishlist_schema.js
scripts.typecheck: node node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && node node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js --noEmit -p tsconfig.tests.json
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test --require ts-node/register --test-concurrency=1 tests/auth-flow.test.ts tests/auth-token-security.test.ts tests/host-onboarding-verification-flow.test.ts tests/listings-endpoints.test.ts tests/bookings-endpoints.test.ts tests/users-rbac-verification.test.ts tests/security-middleware.test.ts tests/trust-safety-uc09.test.ts tests/payments-coupons-payouts-reports.test.ts tests/semantic-search.test.ts tests/listing-image-vision.test.ts
